title: Spring Begins
overview: Along with three others, Natsu wakes up with no idea what's happened. The four of them reach an island and try to figure out a way to survive.

title: Insects Awaken
overview: Convinced that Botan has kidnapped them, Natsu and Arashi sneak out of camp and run into another survivor. Finally, Botan reveals what she knows.

title: Light Snow
overview: Natsu's clumsiness indirectly leads Team Summer B to the rest of their group. Her memories help them figure out their location, and their next moves.

title: Autumn Begins
overview: Arashi, Natsu and Semimaru stumble upon the Team Autumn settlement in the former Kobe region. They seem to be thriving, but their leaders are tyrants.

title: Heavy Snow
overview: In the ruins of Tokyo, Natsu, Arashi and Semimaru meet the sole survivor of Team Winter. Team Spring reaches Mt. Ogino Fuji and finds Natsu's message.

title: Grain Rain
overview: Aramaki joins Team Spring, despite Fujiko's doubts. Hana decides to search for Arashi after hearing that Aramaki met someone who fits his description.

title: Winter Solstice
overview: Hana and her companions discover a massive underground shelter. They find a survivor’s diary and learn the cruel fate of those who took refuge there.

title: Summer Solstice
overview: Hana's group and the Team Autumn survivors find the Spring settlement destroyed and abandoned. Momotaro wakes up among strangers.

title: Lesser Heat
overview: To survive, Hana and the others work together with Team Summer A. On the ship, Hotaru's cousin Hibari tells Natsu that Hotaru is slowly dying.

title: Cold Dew
overview: Ango recalls his harsh upbringing in the program and the brutal graduation test that winnowed the survivors down to the final Team Summer A members.

title: Greater Heat
overview: Hana becomes convinced that Ango will kill her if she stays in the village. Natsu and the others make landfall near the former Autumn settlement.

title: End of Heat
overview: Ryo orders Hana to join him in searching for a water source underground, putting her in a vulnerable position. In the caves, Ango recalls Shigeru.

title: Frost Descends
overview: Team Summer A banishes Ango and Ryo as Haru and the others mourn the missing Hana. Aramaki leaves the settlement believing she is still alive.

title: Summer Begins
overview: Expecting a trap, Ango and Ryo find and observe Team Summer B, but they are unexpectedly welcomed by the easygoing group.

title: Grain in Ear
overview: The two newcomers help Team Summer B. As they get to know the group, Ryo doubts their ability to survive. Ango begins to see Natsu as Shigeru.

title: Autumnal Equinox
overview: The carefree group enjoys life at sea, but Ryo tests their survival skills. Natsu reveals that Team Summer B is for dropouts, angering Ango.

title: Vernal Equinox
overview: Suspicious, Botan searches Ryo and Ango's belongings while the others look for Arashi. Elsewhere, another survivor learns about the wilderness.

title: White Dew
overview: Team Summer B gets stuck in a bed of dense algae. they find a large ship and investigate, but Botan is wary. Stranded, Arashi sees the ship's kite.

title: Winter Begins
overview: The team members are separated after the ship's sudden movement. Arashi makes his way to help as Botan's group makes a discovery.

title: Lesser Cold
overview: Ango's hallucinations lead to perilous situations for him and Arashi. Semimaru has a brush with death while Natsu gathers her courage.

title: Grain Full
overview: A sanctuary in nature becomes a trap for small mammals and humans alike. Meanwhile, an iron-eating bacteria begins to spread throughout the ship.

title: Rain Water
overview: Fujiko and Chisa reunite with Hana. On the ship, the missiles begin launch prep while Team Summer B learns about Ango's past and the test.

title: Greater Cold
overview: Hana readjusts to other humans. Team Summer B works together to manually disable the missiles, but a series of passcodes complicates the process.

title: Pure Brightness
overview: Problems persist in the ship as the spreading bacteria begins attacking. The missile countdown continues as the team makes a mad dash to exit.
